value_chain_position: AI-native advertising and monetization platform layer — sells an AI-driven programmatic ad engine (AXON) that acts as a performance marketing toll-taker between mobile/connected-TV app publishers and advertisers.
relative_comps: AppLovin is the clearest chokepoint in mobile app performance marketing: AXON's AI targeting creates compounding data moats and 51% YoY revenue growth with 71% FCF margin is best-in-class among scaled ad-tech platforms. It trades at a steep premium to TTD and Criteo on EV/FCF, reflecting the growth divergence; Google and Meta are the ceiling competitors but are constrained by antitrust posture, creating structural runway. The ai_infrastructure tag is warranted because AXON is a deployed-inference product paid per auction.
